title: ACLED (Armed Conflict Location & Event Data)
description: Real-time disaggregated data on political violence and protest events. Downloadable datasets covering 100+ countries.

title: ISW Ukraine War Map
org: Institute for the Study of War
description: Daily conflict updates with hand-drawn frontline maps. Gold standard for Ukraine war analysis.

title: UN OCHA Humanitarian Data Exchange
description: Humanitarian datasets for 50+ crises. Displacement, casualties, needs assessments.

title: UNHCR Global Trends Report
description: Annual global refugee statistics. Most authoritative displacement figures.

title: SIPRI Arms Transfers Database
description: Searchable database of international arms transfers, 1950-present. Country-by-country.

title: Council on Foreign Relations Global Conflict Tracker
description: Interactive map tracking 30+ active conflicts with expert analysis and US interest ratings.

title: Bellingcat Open Source Investigation Hub
description: OSINT investigations using satellite imagery, social media, and open data.

title: Ukrainian Ministry of Defence Briefings
description: Official Ukrainian military briefings, casualties claimed, and situation reports.

title: UN OCHA Gaza Situation Reports
description: Bi-weekly situation reports on humanitarian conditions in Gaza with verified statistics.

title: International Crisis Group
description: Deep analysis from field researchers on conflict dynamics, negotiations, prevention.

title: UNOSAT Conflict Analysis
description: UN satellite analysis: damage assessments, urban warfare mapping, displacement zones.

title: World Bank Fragility Data
description: Fragility, conflict, and violence indicators. Economic impact of conflict datasets.

title: ICRC Law and Practice
description: International humanitarian law database, Geneva Convention resources, IHL practice.

title: Global Terrorism Database
description: Comprehensive open-source database of terrorist attacks worldwide 1970-present.

title: Sudan War Monitor
description: Crowdsourced conflict tracking for the Sudan civil war. Incident mapping.

title: Human Rights Watch World Report
description: Annual global human rights documentation, including war crimes evidence and battlefield reporting.

title: Amnesty International Crisis Response
description: Investigations into human rights violations in conflict zones, including weapons use documentation.

title: Reuters Conflict Coverage
description: Real-time conflict news from Reuters global bureau network. Fact-checked reporting from war zones.

title: AP News World Coverage
description: Wire service conflict coverage. Essential for breaking news and verified casualty figures.

title: BBC Monitoring (Open)
description: BBC global conflict coverage. Open access to war reporting from BBC correspondents worldwide.

title: Jane's Defence Intelligence
description: Professional military intelligence, order of battle data, and equipment analysis. Premium but authoritative.

title: IISS Military Balance
description: Annual assessment of worldwide military capabilities, defense economics, and armed forces data.

title: Mercy Corps Conflict Analysis
description: Field-based conflict analysis focusing on humanitarian impact and resilience programming.

title: MSF (Doctors Without Borders) Crisis Briefings
description: Medical humanitarian situation reports from MSF field teams in conflict zones.

title: Oryx Equipment Losses
description: Visual confirmation of vehicle and equipment losses in Ukraine war. Photo-documented database.

title: NATO Updates on Ukraine
description: Official NATO statements, aid packages, and military support documentation.

title: DeepState UA Map
description: Volunteer-maintained real-time frontline map for Ukraine conflict. High update frequency.

title: VIIRS Active Fires / Conflict Fires
description: NASA satellite fire detection. Used by OSINT analysts to detect artillery and airstrikes.

title: Planet Labs Open California
description: Commercial satellite imagery provider. Free tier available. Used for conflict damage assessment.

title: Ukraine Support Tracker (Kiel)
description: Tracks international financial, military, and humanitarian aid to Ukraine by country.

title: ACLED Conflict Watchlist
description: Annual predictions of countries likely to experience conflict escalation.

title: Radio Free Europe / Radio Liberty
description: US-funded open journalism network. Extensive Ukraine, Russia, Central Asia coverage.

title: African Union Peace & Security
description: AU Peace and Security Council reports on African conflicts, mediation efforts.

title: UN Security Council Reports
description: Official UN Security Council reports on global conflict situations, sanctions, and mandates.

title: Harvard Humanitarian Initiative
description: Research on humanitarian crises, protection of civilians, and accountability mechanisms.

title: MapAction Operational Maps
description: Humanitarian response maps for crisis zones. GIS support for humanitarian operations.

title: Liveuamap
description: Real-time conflict tracking map aggregating social media, official and independent sources.

title: Crisis24 Threat Intelligence
description: Professional threat intelligence for security planners. Travel risk assessments.

title: Syria Civil War Map
description: Dedicated conflict tracking for Syria, updated with frontline changes.

title: Conflict Monitor (Tony Blair Institute)
description: Policy analysis on global conflicts, governance failures, and stabilization strategies.

title: ReliefWeb Crisis Updates
description: Humanitarian information portal. Aggregates situation reports, maps, infographics for 100+ crises.

title: OpenStreetMap Humanitarian Team
description: Volunteer map-makers providing crisis mapping for humanitarian operations worldwide.

title: Sentinel Hub EO Browser
description: Free Copernicus satellite imagery browser. Used for damage assessment and military activity monitoring.
